content.text:
Based on my visual analysis of the molecule, I can clearly identify the neighbours of atom 15 (N:15). Looking at the zoomed view, the nitrogen atom (blue) at index 15 has three covalent bonds to the following atoms:

## Neighbour Atoms of N:15:

| Atomic Index | Element |
|--------------|---------|
| 14 | C (Carbon) |
| 16 | C (Carbon) |
| 27 | H (Hydrogen) |

## Summary:
Atom 15 is a nitrogen atom that is bonded to two carbon atoms (C:14 and C:16) and one hydrogen atom (H:27), forming part of a heterocyclic ring structure.

**geomconf_index: 7244**

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 15, whose element should be N. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
